full_text:
Cao Jing 曹京
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Jing (曹京)was born in Pei. Son of Cao Cao. Died young. Posthumously enfeoffed as a duke. Cao Jing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
